description: Hand-labeled task categories for the Phase 0 calibration corpus. Labels use the category names defined in the Phase 3 design proposal. Each entry labels the entire session at aggregate level; turn-level labeling is deferred to Phase 5 calibration.

sessions.label: exploration
sessions.rationale: Entirely Read/Grep tool calls with no mutations. User goal is to understand the authentication flow, not change it.

sessions.label: exploration
sessions.rationale: Read-only investigation of the config precedence system. No edits or writes performed.

sessions.label: mutation_heavy
sessions.rationale: Five Edit calls and one Write call dominate the session. High ratio of mutation tools to read tools.

sessions.label: mutation_heavy
sessions.rationale: Six consecutive Edit calls and one Write. No test run between mutations; pure mechanical annotation task.

sessions.label: debug_loop
sessions.rationale: Multiple test runs that fail, each followed by code inspection and a targeted fix. Classic red-fix-run loop.

sessions.label: debug_loop
sessions.rationale: Iterative import error diagnosis: run → inspect → fix → re-run. Short loop but canonical debug pattern.

sessions.label: planning
sessions.rationale: User explicitly asks for a recommendation. Session produces a written plan and design document with no code changes.

sessions.label: planning
sessions.rationale: Architectural discussion about migration strategy. No code mutations; assistant produces a phased plan.

sessions.label: mixed
sessions.rationale: Begins with exploration (Glob + Read to understand logging), transitions to mutation (Edit), and includes a verification run. Spans multiple task types.

sessions.label: mixed
sessions.rationale: Opens with a planning discussion, then immediately implements the plan (Write + Edit). No single category dominates.
